ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "crim_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  "zn" INTEGER /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq. ft. */,
  "indus" REAL /* Proportion of non-retail business acres per town */,
  "chas" INTEGER /* Charles River dummy variable (1 if tract bounds river; 0 otherwise) */,
  "nox" REAL /* Nitric oxides concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "age" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "dis" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centers */,
  "rad" INTEGER /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "tax" INTEGER /* Full-value property tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "ptratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "b" REAL /* 1000(Bk - 0.63)^2 where Bk is the proportion of blacks by town */,
  "lstat" REAL /* Percentage of lower status of the population */,
  "val" REAL /* Median value of owner-occupied homes in $1000s */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment, commercial) */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the property details were last updated */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to neighborhoods table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing properties table */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., burglary, assault) */,
  "crime_count" INTEGER /* Number of reported incidents */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime data is recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the crime data is recorded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the crime (e.g., street name, intersection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "avg_age" REAL /* Average age of residents */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the neighborhood */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Overall crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the neighborhood (e.g., parks, schools, hospitals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency the agent works for */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the real estate agent */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the real estate industry */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing properties table */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing agents table */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent on the sale */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing buyers table */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the buyer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the buyer registered with the platform */,
  "total_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of properties purchased by the buyer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount of money spent by the buyer on property purchases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing buyers table */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing properties table */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date of the inquiry */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message or description of the inquiry */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing agents table */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry (e.g., open, closed, follow-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average property price in the area */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of properties sold */,
  "most_expensive" REAL /* Price of the most expensive property sold */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region covered by the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, yearly) */,
  "top_neighborhoods" TEXT /* List of top-performing neighborhoods */,
  "trends" TEXT /* Summary of market trends observed in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing properties table */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the property */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "predicted_by" TEXT /* User or system that made the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_value_predictions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., agent, buyer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions assigned to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing user roles table */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login to the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing properties table */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing buyers table */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback submission */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the buyer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the buyer */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link the feedback to the agent */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if follow-up is needed based on the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)
